reviews.review_msg: Very nice and friendly lady, but we all agree she's not the best lecturer. If you take 345 with her make sure to read or you will be lost on the halfway. Just understand her slides and learn how to write analysis in her way then you'll get super high grade on final. Group projects are not too tough but time-consuming.
She looks like she's very nice... but if you talk to when there's problem, she doesn't seem like she wants to help you... indeed cocky too

She's a very, very nice prof...she's just... a little slow,.. sometimes can take 1hr and 15 min on one slide, and then she skips the next 5 slides and manages to finish about 15 slides total in the 2 hr lecture.  10 page lit review was a bit overwhelming.  But not a bad course overall.

Very disorganized and verbose. We were totally dissatisfied with her lectures. Her feedback on our work was absolutely superficial and didn't add any value. No one in my class thought she was worth the money we spent on our tuition.
